description: Contract execution date (e.g. March 26 2026)
Contractor company name
Contractor street address city state zip
California Contractor License number
Customer organization or business name
Project site address city state zip
Customer tax status — C corporation / S corporation / 501(c)(3) / other
If tax status is Other — specify the type
System description e.g. 24kW DC to 28kW DC solar tracker
Material cost escalation threshold percentage e.g. 5%
Labor cost escalation threshold percentage (ENR Skilled Labor Index)
Number of days to complete Phase 1 after Effective Date e.g. 75
Phase 1 fee as a percentage of estimated Total Project Cost e.g. 8%
Estimated Total Project Cost
Phase 1 fee total dollar amount e.g. 1234.56
50% of Phase 1 fee due at signing e.g. 617.28
50% of Phase 1 fee due at delivery of Phase 1 deliverables e.g. 617.28
Number of days to commence Phase 2 after Notice to Proceed e.g. 30
Payment percentage due upon NTP and receipt of building permits e.g. 25%
Payment percentage due upon delivery of equipment to site e.g. 35%
Payment percentage due upon completion of installation e.g. 25%
Payment percentage due upon PTO and delivery of closeout docs e.g. 15%
Whether project is subject to prevailing wage — enter: is OR is not
Workmanship warranty period in years e.g. 1
Phase 1 design and engineering warranty period in years e.g. 1
Full name of person signing on behalf of contractor
Title of person signing on behalf of contractor e.g. President
Date the contract is signed (same as effective date or later)
Full name of customer individual signing the contract
Title of customer signatory — leave blank if sole proprietor
Site photo — image file path or uploaded file name
